name: Glade Cubist Face Features v11
description: Anchor-band clamped facial features (eyes/nose/mouth) to prevent floating placement
code: var ctx=drawingContext,f=state.cubistFrame,p=state.cubist||{}; if(!f) return; var w=f.w,h=f.h,cx=f.x+w*(p.cx||0.5),cy=f.y+h*(p.cy||0.54),sc=(p.scale||1),fw=w*0.56*sc,fh=h*0.74*sc,split=(p.split||0)*fw; function hs(hh,s,l,a){return 'hsla('+(((hh%360)+360)%360)+','+s+'%,'+l+'%,'+a+')';} var pal=f.pal; var top=-fh*0.52,bottom=fh*0.52; function clamp(v,a,b){return Math.max(a,Math.min(b,v));} var eyeY=clamp(-fh*(p.eyeBandY||0.31), top+fh*0.16, top+fh*0.38); var noseY=clamp(-fh*(p.noseBandY||0.49), top+fh*0.34, top+fh*0.62); var mouthY=clamp(-fh*(0.72+((p.mouthBandY||0.70)-0.70)*0.25), top+fh*0.58, bottom-fh*0.10); if(noseY<eyeY+fh*0.08) noseY=eyeY+fh*0.10; if(mouthY<noseY+fh*0.10) mouthY=noseY+fh*0.12; var exL=clamp(-fw*(p.eyeGap||0.2), -fw*0.36, -fw*0.06); var exR=clamp(Math.max(fw*0.05, fw*((p.eyeGap||0.2)*0.45)+split*0.06), fw*0.02, fw*0.30); ctx.save(); ctx.translate(cx,cy); ctx.rotate((p.tilt||0)*0.10); function eye(x,y,t,flip){ctx.beginPath(); if(t===0){ctx.ellipse(x,y,w*0.040,w*0.022,0,0,Math.PI*2);} else if(t===1){ctx.moveTo(x-w*0.034,y);ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x,y-w*0.020,x+w*0.034,y);ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x,y+w*0.020,x-w*0.034,y);} else if(t===2){ctx.moveTo(x-w*0.030,y-w*0.012);ctx.lineTo(x+w*0.032,y);ctx.lineTo(x-w*0.030,y+w*0.012);ctx.closePath();} else if(t===3){ctx.arc(x,y,w*0.028,0,Math.PI*2);} else if(t===4){ctx.rect(x-w*0.030,y-w*0.015,w*0.060,w*0.030);} else {ctx.moveTo(x-w*0.032,y);ctx.bezierCurveTo(x-w*0.012,y-w*0.024,x+w*0.012,y-w*0.024,x+w*0.032,y);ctx.bezierCurveTo(x+w*0.012,y+w*0.024,x-w*0.012,y+w*0.024,x-w*0.032,y);} ctx.fillStyle='rgba(245,242,234,0.96)'; ctx.fill(); ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(24,20,22,0.70)'; ctx.lineWidth=Math.max(1,w*0.003); ctx.stroke(); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(x+(flip?-w*0.002:w*0.002),y,w*0.008,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fillStyle='rgba(12,12,16,0.98)'; ctx.fill(); } eye(exL,eyeY,p.eyeLType||0,false); eye(exR,clamp(eyeY+fh*(0.01+p.eyeAsym*0.06),eyeY-fh*0.02,eyeY+fh*0.03),p.eyeRType||1,true); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(-fw*0.01,noseY-fh*0.08); ctx.lineTo(fw*0.09,noseY+fh*0.04); ctx.lineTo(-fw*0.00,noseY+fh*0.17); ctx.closePath(); ctx.fillStyle=hs(pal[3],50,40,0.95); ctx.fill(); ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(24,20,22,0.68)'; ctx.lineWidth=Math.max(1,w*0.0035); ctx.stroke(); var mw=clamp(fw*(0.28+(p.mouthW||0.30)*0.35), fw*0.18, fw*0.34); var lipH=fh*0.07; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(-mw,mouthY); ctx.bezierCurveTo(-mw*0.35,mouthY+lipH,mw*0.35,mouthY+lipH,mw,mouthY); ctx.bezierCurveTo(mw*0.28,mouthY+lipH*0.55,-mw*0.28,mouthY+lipH*0.55,-mw,mouthY); ctx.closePath(); ctx.fillStyle='rgba(130,32,44,0.94)'; ctx.fill(); ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(70,16,22,0.92)'; ctx.lineWidth=Math.max(2,w*0.0055); ctx.stroke(); ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(20,18,20,0.52)'; ctx.lineWidth=Math.max(1,w*0.0032); ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(exL-w*0.030,eyeY-fh*0.050); ctx.quadraticCurveTo(exL,eyeY-fh*0.075,exL+w*0.030,eyeY-fh*0.048); ctx.moveTo(exR-w*0.028,eyeY-fh*0.035); ctx.quadraticCurveTo(exR,eyeY-fh*0.060,exR+w*0.030,eyeY-fh*0.035); ctx.stroke(); if((p.earType||0)%2===0){ctx.beginPath();ctx.ellipse(-fw*0.40,-fh*0.01,w*0.022,h*0.040,0,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fillStyle=hs(pal[0],30,56,0.70);ctx.fill();} if((p.hairType||0)===0){ctx.fillStyle=hs(pal[2]-18,20,16,0.45);ctx.fillRect(-fw*0.30,-fh*0.50,fw*0.52,fh*0.09);} else if((p.hairType||0)===1){ctx.fillStyle=hs(pal[2]-12,22,18,0.44);ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(-fw*0.30,-fh*0.46);ctx.lineTo(fw*0.18,-fh*0.48);ctx.lineTo(fw*0.04,-fh*0.33);ctx.lineTo(-fw*0.24,-fh*0.33);ctx.closePath();ctx.fill();} ctx.restore();
